calendar.matters:
FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Sep-10-2014 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Sep-10-2014 Off Calendar

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Aug-13-2014 Continued To Sep-10-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Trustee and the Attorney to appear on September 10, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the Third Account has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, FEES
Off Calendar Mar-11-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: M. Armon Cooper for The Good Shepherd Fund.

Mr. Cooper informed the Court that he filed copies of reconciliation statements this morning which address the Probate Examiner's concerns with respect to calculations. The Accounting Petition was taken under submission for review of said document.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy J. Chen.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, FEES
Off Calendar Feb-25-2013 Continued To Mar-11-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, FEES
Off Calendar Feb-11-2013 Continued To Feb-25-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Armon Cooper for The Good Shepard Fund. Dan Jett (Executor Director of Good Shepard) also present.

The Court stated that what was presented by Counsel did not answer the Probate Examiner's questions. Mr. Cooper stated that he filed a declaration this morning and that it is as complete a response they are able to make. The accounting petition was continued to February 25, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the Court to review the declaration.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, FEES
Off Calendar Jan-28-2013 Continued To Feb-11-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Armon Cooper for The Good Shepherd Fund (Petitioner).

Mr. Cooper stated that he filed a revised account to help with the Probate Examiner's questions and that he revised three shedules to identify specific assets in the pooled fund. The accounting petition was continued to February 11, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to file a declaration in response to the Probate Examiner's notes and for the Court to have the opportunity to review the revised schedules.

Judge: Lillian Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
